attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.TASK_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.DATE_COMPUTED, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.COMPLETED_PERCENTAGE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PM_PRODUCT_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.CURRENT_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PERCENT_COMPLETE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.OBJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.OBJECT_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.OBJECT_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PROGRESS_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ESTIMATED_START_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ESTIMATED_FINISH_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ACTUAL_START_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ACTUAL_FINISH_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PUBLISHED_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PUBLISHED_BY_PARTY_ID, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.RECORD_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PROGRESS_COMMENT, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.HISTORY_FLAG, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.STRUCTURE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES,
(
select PERCENT_COMPLETE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES
minus
select PERCENT_COMPLETE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES
) ACM
where 
 ACM.PERCENT_COMPLETE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.PERCENT_COMPLETE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PERCENT_COMPLETES)
